---
title: "The Rev. Joseph Atkin"
---

## The Rev. Joseph Atkin

**Dates:** (1844-1871)

### Description

missionary and martyr

### Biography

Died of wounds just after the death of Bishop Patteson.  See Blain, <i>Biographical Dictionary of Anglicans in the Pacific</i>

### Letters

- Letter from 14 May 1872
- Letter from November 24, 1869.
- Letter from December 21, 1868.
- Letter from Christmas Day [25 December], 1867.
- Letter from March 23, 1867.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
